title: Nezz Pack
description: Nezz Pack is a Minecraft modpack designed for both Survival and PvP gameplay.It focuses heavily on performance optimization to increase FPS and reduce lag.It uses lightweight mods like Sodium, Lithium, and Phosphor for smoother rendering and faster chunk
body: Nezz Pack is a Minecraft modpack designed for Survival and PvP players who want high performance and smooth gameplay. It focuses on boosting FPS, reducing lag, and improving loading speeds using lightweight optimization mods like Sodium, Lithium, and Phosphor. The visuals are kept clean and minimal to make PvP clearer and more responsive, with useful HUD elements such as FPS, CPS, and ping display. In Survival mode, the pack keeps the original vanilla experience while adding small quality-of-life features without heavy content mods. It is optimized especially for low and mid-end PCs, offering stable performance, fast response time, and a clean gameplay experience for both PvP and Survival.
